title: Delicate Norwegian Boudinblanc Roast
description: A buttery, juicy roast featuring traditional Norwegian boudinblanc, finished with a citrus‑herb glaze and served on a tagliere for a cozy meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon coconut oil in a large oven‑proof skillet over medium heat and brown the boudinblanc on all sides for 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic, rosemary, thyme, sliced onion, and smoked paprika to the skillet and sauté until the onion is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring to a gentle simmer, then cover the skillet and transfer to the preheated oven.
Roast for 35 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 160°F (71°C).
Remove the skillet from the oven and baste the sausage with the remaining coconut oil, lemon juice, and a pinch of salt and pepper to create a glossy glaze.
Return the skillet to the oven and roast for an additional 10 minutes to caramelize the glaze.
Transfer the roasted boudinblanc to a cutting board, slice, and garnish with chopped parsley before serving on a tagliere.
